summary: Phase 31 — backend deal-room router extraction + frontend SearchableUserSelect rollout. Backend: 14/14 NEW Phase 31 regression tests PASS (1 skipped: invite-by-email lookup, not an endpoint issue). Prior Phase 27/27.5/30 regression suites: 52 passed, 1 pre-existing skip. Frontend: All 3 dropdown rollouts confirmed as typeable comboboxes — TasksCard 'Assign to...' (filtered 6 users for 'adm'), AssignPartner dialog (filtered 12 partners for 'a'), CommercialDetail UserSelect helper (3 'Search and select user' triggers on the page, typeahead filtered to 6 matches for 'adm' with email as secondary text). Deal-room router successfully mounted at server.py L8074 via late-binding import.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/deal_room.py uses `from server import ...` (late-binding) which works because server.py imports the router only at the bottom (L8074). This pattern is fragile — any future top-of-file import of routers.deal_room from server.py will reintroduce the circular import. Consider extracting shared deps (db, get_current_user, UserRole, NotificationType, create_notification, logger, CommentCreate) into a dedicated module (e.g., backend/core.py or backend/deps.py) so router files have no back-reference to server.py.
server.py is still 8,110 lines; further extractions (e.g., leads/, war-room/, commercials kanban/, predictive/) would improve maintainability.
TasksCard.jsx still imports the legacy shadcn Select (used for the Priority dropdown) alongside SearchableUserSelect — fine, but worth noting the file now has two select systems.

CommercialDetail UserSelect helper is generic-purpose; the placeholder 'Search and select user...' is fixed. Consider parameterising placeholder per field (e.g., 'Choose Project Owner') to improve a11y/UX, but not blocking.
seed_data_creation: TEST_phase31_msg_*, TEST_phase31_approval_*, TEST_phase31_invite_* and TEST_phase31_followup_* records created on first lead. Lightweight; existing TEST_ cleanup conventions apply. No new users created by Phase 31 tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 31 cleanup: (a) Deal-room endpoints fully extracted to /app/backend/routers/deal_room.py, mounted near L8074 of server.py via late-binding `from routers.deal_room import router as deal_room_router; api_router.include_router(deal_room_router)`. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_phase31_deal_room_refactor.py. (b) SearchableUserSelect testids to remember for future UI tests — task-assignee-select (TasksCard), partner-select (AssignedPartners dialog). CommercialDetail UserSelect helper does not pass a testid by default; identify it by placeholder 'Search and select user...'. To open the cmdk popover, click the trigger button with force=True then look for [cmdk-input] and [cmdk-item] selectors. Login admin credentials: admin@vyapaarnetwork.com / admin123. Public URL: https://vyapaar-preview-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
verified_ui_flows: Open lead detail → TasksCard 'Add' → SearchableUserSelect opens cmdk popover → typing 'adm' filters to 6 options (first: 'Super Admin') ✓
Open lead detail → 'Assign Partner' button → partner-select SearchableUserSelect opens cmdk popover → typing 'a' filters to 12 partner options ✓
Open commercial detail → 3 'Search and select user' SearchableUserSelect triggers visible → opening one and typing 'adm' filters to 6 user options with email as secondary text ✓
